top_signals.title: Nvidia spending up to $150bn a year on Taiwan AI suppliers: Jensen Huang
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: HK Banks Tighten Scrutiny of Chinese Clients After Curbs
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong banks are ramping up scrutiny of mainland Chinese clients opening savings and investment accounts, part of a broader push to stem capital flight after Beijing launched an unprecedented crackdown on illegal cross-border trading.
